title: A bright UFO over Boa Viagem beach in Recife-PE [2011]

text_preview:
OCTOBER 8th, 2011. From the balcony of his residence, in the Boa Viagem neighborhood, city of Recife, State of Pernambuco, an aircraft pilot spotted an unidentified flying object with intense light, moving above the Boa Viagem beach, from 5:25pm to 5:30pm, and performing an unusual maneuver. The witness promptly reported the sighting to the ACC-Recife [Recife-PE Area Control Center] which registered it.

According to the document filled by COMDABRA’s representative [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], the witness: “REPORTED THAT HE SAW A STRONG LIGHT IN A PARALLEL ROUTE TO THE BOA VIAGEM BEA
summary: Aircraft pilot from Boa Viagem neighborhood, Recife, watched a bright fast-moving light parallel to the beach perform a sharp high-speed right turn before disappearing over the horizon.
